rationale: Educ. Code §8.101 governs performance standards for regional education service centers. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: The commissioner shall establish performance standards and indicators for regional education service centers that measure the achievement of the objectives in Section 8.002.
_note: Rule text concerns education service center performance standards; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
